## Summary

<!-- One-sentence statement of what you want -->

     Google AI Overviews docs, llms.txt spec, etc.) -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Sketch of API or CLI flag, or where in the codebase it would live -->

## Alternatives

<!-- What did you consider and reject? -->

## Constraints to remember

- [ ] Stdlib only — no new pip dependencies in requirements.txt
- [ ] Works on Windows + Linux + macOS
- [ ] Doesn't break the `gui.py` single-URL pipeline
- [ ] Doesn't introduce telemetry or callouts to third-party services
      (other than user-opted-in API integrations)

## Are you offering to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
